message:
fix(abi): use md5::Digest instead of sha2::Digest for Md5 type

The Md5 type needs its Digest trait from the md5 crate, not sha2.
After the nightly toolchain update (1.95→1.96), the cross-crate
trait resolution became stricter, causing compilation failure in
crypt_md5. This also fixes the dlfcn_abi_test compilation issue
that SilentFrog reported as 14 test failures (which were actually
stale-artifact compilation errors, not test logic failures).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
